name: Scottish Shortbread Mix with Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until combined.
3. Shape the mixture into a flat disk and wrap in plastic wrap.
4. Chill for at least 30 minutes before cutting into squares.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
6. Turn off oven and let cool completely before serving.
